Package org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.service.discovery.pixel

Interface DiscoveryPixelService

All Known Implementing Classes:
DiscoveryPixelServiceImpl
public interface DiscoveryPixelService
Fires server-side Discovery pixel events asynchronously after each result is fetched. Implementations must swallow all errors — pixel failure must never affect page rendering.

Callers must pass a resolved PixelFlags instance; passing PixelFlags.DISABLED guarantees that no pixel traffic is produced regardless of env/channel configuration.
